old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-aiq3","title":"app_identity: No peer removal API prevents TOFU key rotation","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/app_identity/app_identity.c

The SECURITY comment at line 203-209 states: 'Key rotation requires explicit removal followed by re-add.' However, there is no lichen_app_identity_remove_peer() function exposed in the API.

Impact: Once a peer's public key is pinned via TOFU (Trust On First Use), there is no way to remove it. If a peer's private key is compromised and they generate a new keypair, nodes cannot update the pinned key. The compromised peer is permanently locked out of the network from the perspective of other nodes.

The only removal mechanism is lichen_app_identity_test_reset() which:
1. Is guarded by CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_IDENTITY_TEST_HOOKS
2. Clears ALL peers, not a single one
3. Is only intended for unit testing

Suggested fix: Add a removal function:
int lichen_app_identity_remove_peer(const uint8_t eui64[LICHEN_APP_IDENTITY_EUI64_LEN]);","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:39:54.198649Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:39:54.198692Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-aiq3","title":"app_identity: No peer removal API prevents TOFU key rotation","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/app_identity/app_identity.c

The SECURITY comment at line 203-209 states: 'Key rotation requires explicit removal followed by re-add.' However, there is no lichen_app_identity_remove_peer() function exposed in the API.

Impact: Once a peer's public key is pinned via TOFU (Trust On First Use), there is no way to remove it. If a peer's private key is compromised and they generate a new keypair, nodes cannot update the pinned key. The compromised peer is permanently locked out of the network from the perspective of other nodes.

The only removal mechanism is lichen_app_identity_test_reset() which:
1. Is guarded by CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_IDENTITY_TEST_HOOKS
2. Clears ALL peers, not a single one
3. Is only intended for unit testing

Suggested fix: Add a removal function:
int lichen_app_identity_remove_peer(const uint8_t eui64[LICHEN_APP_IDENTITY_EUI64_LEN]);","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:39:54.198649Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:17:14.003382153Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:17:14.003382153Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:22:14.003382153Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:17:14.003382153Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: b06f2bc7f - remove_peer() API and impl already present (header:97, c:319). Updated TOFU comment to reference lichen_app_identity_remove_peer() explicitly. Key rotation now documented."}
remove_peer API implemented and documented (commit b06f2bc7f). TOFU key rotation supported.
